body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Electrophysiological correlates of dispositional mindfulness: Aquantitative and complexity EEG study.** — British journal of psychology (London, England : 1953) (2023). PMID: . DOI: 10.1111/bjop.12636. Score: 20. While growing evidence supports that dispositional mindfulness relates to psychological health and cognitive enhancement, to date there have been only afew attempts to characterize its neural underpinnings. In the present study, we aimed at exploring the electrophysiological (EEG) signature of dispositional mindfulness using quantitative and complexity measures of EEG during resting state and while performing alearning task.
